moments.title: World Cup Final Countdown
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 in North America culminates this Sunday with the final match in New York/New Jersey.

angles.name: Final Hype
angles.copy: Seven days to go until the FIFA World Cup 2026 Champion is crowned! Who are you backing to lift the trophy this Sunday?

angles.name: Tournament Recap
angles.copy: What a tournament it's been! As the #WorldCup2026 final approaches, what's been your favourite moment so far?

angles.name: Final Host City
angles.copy: The biggest game in football heads to New York/New Jersey this Sunday. Imagine the atmosphere! #WorldCupFinal

moments.title: The Open Championship Begins
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship officially begins on Thursday, July 16, at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England.

angles.name: Tee Off
angles.copy: Golf's biggest major is almost here! The 154th Open Championship tees off this Thursday at Royal Birkdale. Who's your pick for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Royal Birkdale
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale hosts The Open for the 11th time this week. This iconic course always delivers drama! #Golf #RoyalBirkdale

angles.name: Local Excitement
angles.copy: Excitement is building in Southport as Royal Birkdale prepares to welcome the world's best golfers for The Open from Thursday! #NorthWest #Golf

moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Wraps Up
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships 2026 concluded yesterday, July 12, with Jannik Sinner winning the Gentlemen's Singles title.

angles.name: Wimbledon Review
angles.copy: Another incredible Wimbledon comes to a close! What was your highlight from two weeks of grass-court glory? #Wimbledon2026

angles.name: Sinner's Victory
angles.copy: Jannik Sinner lifts the Wimbledon trophy again! A dominant performance to take the Gentlemen's Singles title. #Champion

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival kicks off on Wednesday, July 15, in Stornoway, Outer Hebrides, Scotland, running until July 18.

angles.name: Festival Start
angles.copy: Get ready for a fantastic blend of music and culture! The Hebridean Celtic Festival starts this Wednesday in Stornoway. #HebCelt

angles.name: Island Vibes
angles.copy: Heading to the Outer Hebrides this week? The Hebridean Celtic Festival promises four days of incredible music and island magic!

moments.title: Splendour Festival This Weekend
moments.blurb: Nottingham's Wollaton Hall & Deer Park hosts Splendour Festival this weekend, July 18-19, with a line-up spanning multiple genres.

angles.name: Nottingham Calling
angles.copy: Splendour Festival takes over Wollaton Park this weekend! Who are you excited to see in Nottingham? #SplendourFestival

angles.name: Weekend Plans
angles.copy: Two days of music, comedy, and good vibes at Splendour Festival, starting Saturday! Perfect summer weekend plans. #FestivalSeason

moments.title: Latitude Festival Nears
moments.blurb: Klarna presents Latitude Festival celebrates its 20th anniversary next weekend, July 23-26, at Henham Park, Suffolk.

angles.name: Festival Prep
angles.copy: Only 10 days until Latitude Festival opens its gates for its 20th anniversary! Are your tents packed and ready for Henham Park? #Latitude2026

angles.name: 20 Years of Latitude
angles.copy: Celebrating two decades of music, arts, and culture! Latitude Festival is almost here, July 23-26. #FestivalVibes

moments.title: Roger McGuinn Turns 84
moments.blurb: Roger McGuinn, co-founder and lead singer of The Byrds, celebrates his 84th birthday today.

angles.name: Folk Rock Legend
angles.copy: Happy 84th Birthday to the legendary Roger McGuinn of The Byrds! Still pioneering that distinctive jingle-jangle sound. #RogerMcGuinn #TheByrds

angles.name: Timeless Tunes
angles.copy: From 'Mr. Tambourine Man' to 'Turn! Turn! Turn!', Roger McGuinn's influence on music is immense. Celebrating his 84th today! #MusicLegend

moments.title: Olly Alexander Turns 35
moments.blurb: Olly Alexander, frontman of Years & Years and recent UK Eurovision representative, turns 35 on Wednesday, July 15.

angles.name: Pop Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 35th Birthday to the incredible Olly Alexander this Wednesday! What's your favourite Years & Years track?

angles.name: Eurovision Star
angles.copy: From chart-topping hits to the Eurovision stage, Olly Alexander continues to shine. Celebrating his birthday on July 15!

moments.title: Stewart Copeland Turns 74
moments.blurb: Stewart Copeland, the influential drummer and co-founder of The Police, celebrates his 74th birthday on Thursday, July 16.

angles.name: Drumming Legend
angles.copy: Sending big birthday wishes to The Police's iconic drummer, Stewart Copeland, turning 74 this Thursday! What's your favourite Police track?

angles.name: Rhythm Master
angles.copy: From reggae-infused rock to film scores, Stewart Copeland's unique drumming style is unmistakable. Happy Birthday on July 16!

moments.title: Geezer Butler Turns 77
moments.blurb: Terence 'Geezer' Butler, the legendary bassist and lyricist for Black Sabbath, turns 77 on Friday, July 17.

angles.name: Metal Pioneer
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to the godfather of heavy metal bass, Geezer Butler of Black Sabbath! His riffs and lyrics shaped a genre. #GeezerButler #BlackSabbath

angles.name: Iconic Bassist
angles.copy: Celebrating the man behind some of rock's most enduring lyrics and heaviest basslines. Happy Birthday, Geezer Butler, this Friday!

moments.title: Natasha Hamilton Turns 44
moments.blurb: Natasha Hamilton, singer from the hugely successful British girl group Atomic Kitten, celebrates her 44th birthday on Friday, July 17.

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 44th Birthday to Atomic Kitten's Natasha Hamilton this Friday! What's your favourite hit from the pop trio?

angles.name: Girl Group Power
angles.copy: From 'Whole Again' to 'The Tide Is High', Natasha Hamilton helped define 00s pop. Celebrating her birthday on July 17!

moments.title: UK Heatwave Continues
moments.blurb: The UK is experiencing a warm spell this week, with temperatures across England and Wales forecast to reach up to 34°C in places.

angles.name: Stay Cool
angles.copy: Another hot one today! Remember to stay hydrated and seek shade as the UK heatwave continues. How are you keeping cool? #UKWeather #Heatwave

angles.name: Sunshine & Showers
angles.copy: Sunshine and high temperatures for much of the UK this week, with some patchy rain in the north. Perfect summer vibes! #BritishSummer
